description_long: This handbag features a woven straw-like body with a natural beige color, accented by a wide band of intricate, colorful geometric beadwork near the top. The upper edge, corners, and wrist strap are made of a smooth, matte blue material, likely synthetic leather or fabric, providing both structure and contrast. The beadwork band displays a repeating pattern of red, yellow, and blue motifs, adding a vibrant decorative touch. The bag is rectangular with a slightly tapered bottom, and the blue wrist strap is attached at one end with a metal rivet. The closure appears to be a zipper running along the top edge, ensuring secure storage. The overall design blends traditional craftsmanship with modern, urban style, making it suitable for casual outings in city environments.
description: A rectangular woven handbag with a colorful geometric beadwork band, blue synthetic accents, and a blue wrist strap. Features a zipper closure and a blend of traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven beige body, colorful beadwork band, blue upper edge, and blue corner accents with the wrist strap visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile, blue strap attachment, and a glimpse of the beadwork and woven texture.
description_view_2: Back view similar to the front, with the woven body, beadwork band, and blue accents, but without the wrist strap in clear view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile, blue strap attachment, and the continuation of the beadwork and woven pattern.
attribute_strap_type: Single wrist strap, medium length, non-adjustable, attached at one end with a metal rivet.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Colorful geometric beadwork band near the top edge.
attribute_pattern: Woven herringbone pattern on the body with a geometric beadwork band.
